title: Simple Radio FFAPI Patch
description: This is a datapack that patches some recipe issues between Simple Radio and Forgified Fabric API.
body:
# Overview
This is a small datapack that patches the recipes from Simple Radio so that the Fabric API within FFAPI does not try to load the recipe conditions within them (and thus fail to load the recipe altogether).

This is a temporary fix for an issue, and **WILL** be obsolete once an alternative solution has been implemented.

The datapack can be added like any other datapack, by simply dropping into the `/datapacks/` folder within your world.

All the datapack does is remove the fabric conditions from the recipes, since Forge would have loaded them at that point, so Fabric API loading it on top of it is not necessary.
